<!-- generated by /context-docs on 2026-05-20 -->
# Function Inventory

All utility functions live in [`utils/`](../../utils/). Legacy / exploratory scripts are in [`utils/archive/0_R/`](../../utils/archive/0_R/) and are not part of the active pipeline.

No formal `testthat` suite exists. The single informal test is [`utils/archive/0_R/pir_test.R`](../../utils/archive/0_R/pir_test.R) (validates `calc_pir()` manually). All functions below are **untested** in a formal sense.

---

## utils/fun_read_pcr.R

| Function | Signature | Purpose | Tested? |
|----------|-----------|---------|---------|
| [`read_pcr()`](../../utils/fun_read_pcr.R) | `read_pcr(path, sheet)` | Reads Quantstudio3 qPCR Excel output; returns raw data.frame | ✗ |

## utils/fun_read_platemap.R

| Function | Signature | Purpose | Tested? |
|----------|-----------|---------|---------|
| [`read_platemap()`](../../utils/fun_read_platemap.R) | `read_platemap(fn_path, sheet_name)` | Reads well-to-pool-ID platemap CSV; returns data.frame | ✗ |

| Function | Signature | Purpose | Tested? |
|----------|-----------|---------|---------|
| [`read_list()`](../../utils/fun_read_list.R) | `read_list(path, pattern)` | Reads multiple files matching a glob pattern into a named list | ✗ |

| Function | Signature | Purpose | Tested? |
|----------|-----------|---------|---------|
| [`read_latest()`](../../utils/fun_read_latest.R) | `read_latest(path)` | Loads the most-recently-modified `.RData` file from a directory | ✗ |
| [`check_files_date()`](../../utils/fun_read_latest.R) | `check_files_date(directory)` | Prints timestamps of all `.RData` files in a directory (audit helper) | ✗ |

## utils/fun_clean_wnvs.R

| Function | Signature | Purpose | Tested? |
|----------|-----------|---------|---------|
| [`wnv_s_clean()`](../../utils/fun_clean_wnvs.R) | `wnv_s_clean(df, all_cols, zone_lvls, distinct_col, silence, rm_dupes, rm_col)` | Master cleaner: trims whitespace, renames columns, assigns year/week, enforces zone factor levels, optionally deduplicates | ✗ |

|----------|-----------|---------|---------|

## utils/fun_clean_long_hx.R

| Function | Signature | Purpose | Tested? |
|----------|-----------|---------|---------|
| [`clean_long_hx()`](../../utils/fun_clean_long_hx.R) | `clean_long_hx(ytd, hx, grp_var)` | Reshapes year-to-date and historical data into long format for historical comparison plots | ✗ |
| [`clean_long_hx_wk()`](../../utils/fun_plot_hx.R) | `clean_long_hx_wk(ytd, hx, rm_zone, comb_zone, grp_vars, spp_keep)` | Weekly variant of `clean_long_hx()`; `spp_keep` controls which species are retained (default `c("Pipiens", "Tarsalis")`) | ✓ |

## utils/fun_calc_abund.R

| Function | Signature | Purpose | Tested? |
|----------|-----------|---------|---------|
| [`calc_abund()`](../../utils/fun_calc_abund.R) | `calc_abund(df, grp_var, spp_keep, rm_zone)` | Calculates mosquito abundance (count/trap-night) with 95% CI by zone/species/week using CDC L-trap data | ✗ |

## utils/fun_calc_pir.R

| Function | Signature | Purpose | Tested? |
|----------|-----------|---------|---------|
| [`calc_pir()`](../../utils/fun_calc_pir.R) | `calc_pir(df, grp_var, zone_complete, rm_zone)` | Calculates Pooled Infection Rate (PIR) via `PooledInfRate::pIR` MLE with bootstrap CI; CDC standard method | ✗ (informal test in utils/archive/0_R/pir_test.R) |

## utils/fun_calc_vi.R

| Function | Signature | Purpose | Tested? |
|----------|-----------|---------|---------|
| [`calc_vi()`](../../utils/fun_calc_vi.R) | `calc_vi(abund, pir, grp_var)` | Computes Virus Index = infection_rate × abundance; core WNV risk metric | ✗ |
| [`calc_vi_stats()`](../../utils/fun_calc_vi.R) | `calc_vi_stats(data, grp_var, rm_zone)` | Aggregates VI statistics by zone/species; handles N=1 edge cases | ✗ |

## utils/fun_calc_pools.R

| Function | Signature | Purpose | Tested? |
|----------|-----------|---------|---------|
| [`calc_pools()`](../../utils/fun_calc_pools.R) | `calc_pools(df, grp_var, rm_zone)` | Summarises pooled testing: count of pools, positives, and infection rate by pool size | ✗ |

| Function | Signature | Purpose | Tested? |
|----------|-----------|---------|---------|

| Function | Signature | Purpose | Tested? |

## utils/fun_build_tables.R

| Function | Signature | Purpose | Tested? |
|----------|-----------|---------|---------|
| [`build_tables()`](../../utils/fun_build_tables.R) | `build_tables(current_wk, pools)` | Builds the current-week "A" report tables (`t1a`/`t2a`/`t3a`: abundance/PIR/VI, collected/traps, examined/pools) from `calc_all()` output and pool counts. Pure — no file I/O. Replaces `utils/archive/0_R/tables.R` | ✓ |

## utils/fun_inject_graph_data.R

| Function | Signature | Purpose | Tested? |
|----------|-----------|---------|---------|
| [`inject_graph_data()`](../../utils/fun_inject_graph_data.R) | `inject_graph_data(wb, sheet, datasets, layout, drop_first_col = TRUE)` | Writes value columns from each dataset into an `openxlsx` workbook at the `(start_row, start_col)` anchors defined in `graph_sheet_layout` (`config/config_weekly.R`); mutates and returns the workbook | ✓ |

## utils/fun_generate_report.R

| Function | Signature | Purpose | Tested? |
|----------|-----------|---------|---------|
| [`generate_report()`](../../utils/fun_generate_report.R) | `generate_report(data_sheets, graph_datasets, graph_layout, template_path, out_path, week_filter, week_cells, update, gname, gfolder)` | Builds the weekly report workbook from the pixel-faithful `tests/fixtures/graph_plot_template.xlsx` scaffold: injects the 6 graph datasets via `inject_graph_data()`, stamps "Week: N" into the formula cells at `graph_week_cells`, adds the flat data sheets, saves the xlsx. When `update = TRUE` and `gfolder` is set, also pushes flat data sheets to a new GSheet and uploads the formatted `.xlsx` (with the `graphs` sheet) to `gfolder` via `drive_upload()`. Replaces `utils/archive/0_R/generate_report.R` | ✓ |

## utils/fun_bird_report.R

| Function | Signature | Purpose | Tested? |
|----------|-----------|---------|---------|
| [`build_bird_report()`](../../utils/fun_bird_report.R) | `build_bird_report(cq_data, target = "WNV")` | Filters merged Cq data to `sample_type == "bird"` and returns `list(birds, bird_report)`, where `bird_report` derives `wnv_result` (positive/negative) from `test_code` for the given target virus | ✓ |
| [`plot_birds()`](../../utils/fun_bird_report.R) | `plot_birds(bird_report, pal = c(positive = "#c5283d", negative = "grey70"))` | Bar plot of WNV-positive vs. negative dead-bird counts by week | ✓ |
